question_en: What deeper issue did the opening blocksize conflict reveal?
choices_en: A minor issue of branding only
The core issue was who had authority to define Bitcoin and change its rules.
A debate with no constitutional stakes
question_ko: 초기 블록사이즈 충돌은 어떤 더 깊은 문제를 드러냈는가?
choices_ko: 누가 비트코인을 정의하고 규칙을 바꿀 권한을 가지는가가 핵심 문제였다.
explanation_en: The core issue was who had authority to define Bitcoin and change its rules.
explanation_ko: 누가 비트코인을 정의하고 규칙을 바꿀 권한을 가지는가가 핵심 문제였다.
